title: "P3.01 — (placeholder — replace with Part 3, Problem 1 title)"
problem-id: 1
status: not-started

date-modified: "2026-05-18"
description: "Placeholder. Part 3 not yet started."
date: "2026-05-18"
---

::: {.callout-warning appearance="simple"}
This problem hasn't been started yet.
:::
